'''βàög-ng-z-g''' ('''kagangzegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tee|tee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tee|tee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàög-ng-z-g
|-
! Lemma
| kagangzegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigangzegoko|thigangzegoko]] || [[word:jigangzegoko|jigangzegoko]] || [[word:shigangzegoko|shigangzegoko]] || [[word:kigangzegoko|kigangzegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugangzegoko|thuthugangzegoko]] || [[word:jujugangzegoko|jujugangzegoko]] || [[word:shushugangzegoko|shushugangzegoko]] || [[word:kukugangzegoko|kukugangzegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugangzegoko|thugangzegoko]] || [[word:jugangzegoko|jugangzegoko]] || [[word:shugangzegoko|shugangzegoko]] || [[word:kugangzegoko|kugangzegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugangzegoko|thugangzegoko]] || [[word:jugangzegoko|jugangzegoko]] || [[word:shugangzegoko|shugangzegoko]] || [[word:kugangzegoko|kugangzegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogangzegoko|thothogangzegoko]] || [[word:jojogangzegoko|jojogangzegoko]] || [[word:shoshogangzegoko|shoshogangzegoko]] || [[word:kokogangzegoko|kokogangzegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogangzegoko|thogangzegoko]] || [[word:jogangzegoko|jogangzegoko]] || [[word:shogangzegoko|shogangzegoko]] || [[word:kogangzegoko|kogangzegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogangzegoko|thogangzegoko]] || [[word:jogangzegoko|jogangzegoko]] || [[word:shogangzegoko|shogangzegoko]] || [[word:kogangzegoko|kogangzegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠgangzegoko|thΟΠgangzegoko]] || [[word:jΟΠgangzegoko|jΟΠgangzegoko]] || [[word:shΟΠgangzegoko|shΟΠgangzegoko]] || [[word:kΟΠgangzegoko|kΟΠgangzegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagangzegoko|thathagangzegoko]] || [[word:jajagangzegoko|jajagangzegoko]] || [[word:shashagangzegoko|shashagangzegoko]] || [[word:kakagangzegoko|kakagangzegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagangzegoko|thagangzegoko]] || [[word:jagangzegoko|jagangzegoko]] || [[word:shagangzegoko|shagangzegoko]] || [[word:kagangzegoko|kagangzegoko]]
|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
